{{Quote|I think they'd like to be our executioners!|[[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]]|<ref name="SW60" />}}
The '''Skirmish at Chinshassa''' was a brief battle between [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]] under the command of [[Red Leader/Legends|Red Leader]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and the nomad warriors known as [[Em'liy/Legends|Em'liy]] in the supposed home city of [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Lumiya|Shira Brie]] on [[Shalyvane]].

==Background==
[[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]]<ref name="NEGTC">''[[The New Essential Guide to Characters]]''</ref> [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Lumiya|Shira Brie]] asked for leave time to visit her home [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Shalyvane]]. Since she could not be given the secret coordinates of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] base on [[Arbra/Legends|Arbra]], [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] agreed to join her on her trip, along with fellow pilots [[Hanc Thorben]] and [[Wald (pilot)|Wald]]. They arrived at the ruins of the city of [[Chinshassa]]. At the [[Circle of Kavaan/Legends|Circle of Kavaan]], the other pilots watched as Brie cut her hand and dripped blood onto the altar in the center of the Circle as part of some kind of ritual.<ref name="SW60" />

==The battle==
Brie's silent prayer was interrupted by the arrival of a large group of nomadic warriors known as Em'liy at the edge of the city. They began firing on the Rogues' position, while the Rebels took fire with their [[Blaster/Legends|blasters]]. Brie explained that the Em'liy had betrayed her people to the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] years ago, leading to the destruction of the city. During the intense firefight Skywalker's [[Droid/Legends|droid]], [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]], detected an opening to an underground drainage system. Brie dropped down into the tunnel but the entrance collapsed with her still inside. As the hordes of Em'liy made their final charge, the Rebels' blasters ran dry. Skywalker was ready to take down as many as he could with his [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] before they were inevitably overrun, but Brie's [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing]] appeared overhead and attacked the warriors, killing many of them and sending the rest into retreat.<ref name="SW60" />

==Aftermath==
In a ceremony back at [[Haven Base]] on Arbra, Shira Brie was honored by the Rebel Alliance with the [[Burdine Cluster]] for saving her squadmates and was promoted to the rank of [[Captain/Legends|Captain]]. After Shira was seemingly killed by Skywalker during a [[Battle of the secret armada|space battle]],<ref name="SW61" /> Luke discovered that not only had she been an Imperial spy all along,<ref name="SW63">[[Star Wars (1977) 63|''Star Wars'' (1977) 63]]</ref> but also that Chinshassa had actually been the home of the Em'liy before the Empire [[Cleansing of Shalyvane|destroyed]] it<ref name="SW62">[[Star Wars (1977) 62|''Star Wars'' (1977) 62]]</ref> to provide Shira with a credible background and motivation for joining the Alliance.<ref name="SW63" />
